title: Add internal test mode with three test profiles for pattern verification

requirements.summary: Create a frontend Test Mode page for internal developer testing that displays all three test profiles with complete analysis results
acceptanceCriteria: Test Mode page exists in frontend with route configuration
Page displays all three test profiles (Healthy, Moderate, Serious) side by side or in tabs
Each profile shows section scores with color-coded status indicators
Each profile displays detected patterns and solution tips using existing AnalysisCard components
Page clearly indicates it is for internal testing only
Visual presentation matches the design patterns of existing ResultsPage component

file_operations.description: Create Test Mode page component that fetches test data from backend using getTestData() method, displays all three test profiles (Healthy, Moderate, Serious) in a tabbed or side-by-side layout. Each profile section shows section scores using SectionScoreCard components, detected problems and recommendations using AnalysisCard components, and medical history effects. Include a prominent banner indicating this is for internal testing only. Use existing components (CircularScoreGauge, SectionScoreCard, AnalysisCard) to match the visual design of ResultsPage. Process each profile through patternAnalysis.ts to generate problems and recommendations from the test score data.

Add route configuration for the Test Mode page at path '/test-mode' in the TanStack Router setup. Wire the new TestModePage component into the routing structure so it can be accessed via direct URL navigation for internal testing purposes.

Add TypeScript type definitions for test profile data structures if needed to support the display of test profiles with their scores, medical history, and analysis results. Ensure compatibility with the backend getTestData() response structure which returns three SectionScores and three MedicalHistory objects.

Create utility functions to process raw test data from backend (SectionScores and MedicalHistory tuples) into a format suitable for display in TestModePage. Include functions to convert section scores into the format expected by patternAnalysis.ts (array of 40 question scores), to run pattern analysis for each test profile, and to format medical history objects for display. This utility bridges the backend test data format with the frontend display requirements.
